at(warmup_steps)\\n        progress = (step_idx - warmup_steps) / float(max(total_steps - warmup_steps, 1))\\n        return 0.1 + 0.9 * 0.5 * (1.0 + np.cos(np.pi * progress))\\n\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.LambdaLR(optimizer, lr_lambda)\",\"text\":\"\"},{\"anchor\":\"\",\"function\":\"\",\"new\":\"USE_LR_SCHEDULE = True\",\"old\":\"USE_LR_SCHEDULE = False\",\"op\":\"replace_exact\",\"source\":\"\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"indexing\",\"rationale\":\"For a flat MLP trained for only 256 fixed steps, the baseline Adam setup is likely under-aggressive.
